notes: "The repo pins the exact training split via a published pre-tokenized/pre-shuffled HF dataset (dvruette/gidd-nemotron-cc-pretok), a committed nemotron-cc-split.txt file list, and a fixed tokenizer ID, so users are not expected to reproduce the preprocessing pipeline independently.

data.notes: "The repo pins the exact training split via a published pre-tokenized/pre-shuffled HF dataset (dvruette/gidd-nemotron-cc-pretok), a committed nemotron-cc-split.txt file list, and a fixed tokenizer ID, so users are not expected to reproduce the preprocessing pipeline independently.
